title: Oceanus+Continents
description: Enables using Oceanus together with Continents
body:
> **Oceanus and all my other packs will no longer get updated, but anyone is welcome to fork or continue the project!**

# Oceanus + Continents 

Enables using [Oceanus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/oceanus) and [Continents](https://modrinth.com/datapack/continents) simultaneously.

## Load order

Datapack load order should be as follows:

1. Oceanus + Continents
2. Oceanus
3. Continents

![Load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0adfff75ffb35b9f7fc3d4dfe91d94594c844636.png)

If using Continents as a mod(as opposed to as a datapack), load Oceanus and this add-on the same way, **however you should use Oceanus as a datapack**.
